selected.title: Pokémon Go (Persuasive Gaming)
selected.desc: An experiment to see if you could move mass groups of people around to where you wanted them to monetize checkpoints.
selected.quote: Pokémon, she said, is about herding people to monetize checkpoints without them being fully aware of it.

selected.title: China (Algorithmic Governance)
selected.desc: Adjusting behavior with "social credits" for rewards/penalties, forcibly reprogram if unresponsive (Xinjiang).
selected.quote: And if the data from all the different sources showed a person behaving well... then they would be given what were called social credits.

selected.title: China (Massive Land Grab)
selected.desc: Organized gangs were forcing farmers out of their houses at gunpoint and seizing their land.
selected.quote: Organized gangs were forcing farmers out of their houses at gunpoint and seizing their land.

selected.title: 2008 Global Economic Crash
selected.desc: Mortgage systems failed completely, leading to global crash; governments transferred private debt to public, leading to austerity.
selected.quote: In 2008, the systems in the banks that had structured the mortgage loans failed completely. It led to a global economic crash.

selected.title: Liberal Avoidance (Despair)
selected.desc: Liberals avoided facing genuine grievances and real anger, having no idea how to solve problems of desolation/despair.
selected.quote: But the liberal opposition, it was a way of avoiding facing up to the genuine grievances and the very real anger in America that Trump's election had revealed.

selected.title: Future (Imagine New)
selected.desc: Regain confidence, imagine genuinely new kinds of futures (David Graeber: "the world is something we make and could just as easily make differently").
selected.quote: If we can regain our confidence, we will find that we have the power to influence how that future turns out. And as a first step, we have to start imagining what kind of future it is we want to build.

selected.title: Zubaydah's Diary (Fragments)
selected.desc: A vast collage of memories and feelings, written after shrapnel pierced his skull, leaving his world in fragments.
selected.quote: Then his memories from the past began to come back but in a mass of fragments. Nothing linked them. They made no sense.
